title: Tensions And Weakness In The World Outside Of China
section_path: Tensions And Weakness In The World Outside Of China
section_path_text: Tensions And Weakness In The World Outside Of China
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
We remain most bearish for the world outside of China for the near-term. Global crude steel production outside of China totaled only 67.4 million tons last month. This is down month-on-month by 5.5 million tons (-8%) and is 6.6 million tons (-9%) less than was reported last year for June 2021's production.
